title: Fable表现优异，指数进步带来飞跃
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "Fable was really good, as I wrote last week after testing it.
It was a leap, but that may because, as exponential gains progress, the improvements in each incremental release are increasingly large. If so, Anthropic will not be the only lab making leaps. https://t.co/ieVWK0q6wD" / X
Post
Log in Sign up

Ethan Mollick
@emollick
Fable was really good, as I wrote last week after testing it.
It was a leap, but that may because, as exponential gains progress, the improvements in each incremental release are increasingly large. If so, Anthropic will not be the only lab making leaps.
What it feels like to work with Mythos
